items.title: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.summary: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed to its most influential posts for Wall Street traders.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Google AI Mode Now Supports More Connected Apps Including YouTube Music for Everyday Tasks
items.summary: Google announced that users can now link and interact with some of thier go-to services right in AI Mode. Google has integrated with Canva, Instacart, and YouTube Music in the A...

items.title: SpaceX abruptly scrubs Starship test flight
items.summary: The flight was the first mission planned by Elon Musk after SpaceX went public on Wall Street in June, with a record initial public offering of $135
